name: Peppered Beef Tenderloin with Mustard & Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Sauce: Whisk all ingredients in a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate sauce until ready to serve. Sauce can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.
Beef: Coarsely grind all peppercorns in a spice grinder or blender. Transfer peppercorns to a bowl. Mix in salt. Whisk together mustard, butter, and chopped parsley in a medium bowl to blend. Rub the mixture over the tenderloin. Roll the tenderloin in the peppercorn mixture, coating it completely. This can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
Preheat oven to 450°F. Place the tenderloin on a rack set in a shallow baking pan.
Roast until a meat thermometer inserted into the center registers 130°F for rare, about 35 minutes. Transfer roast to a platter. Let stand 10 minutes. Cut roast into slices. Arrange on platter. Surround with parsley. Serve with sauce.
Beef was excellent!
